scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Male chef (image2) in white double-breasted chef coat, black-and-white checkered pants, and white chef hat hauls a crate of vegetables through the dining area barely glancing up, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in a cream cable-knit sweater and dark wash jeans who stands nearby facing him. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Few customers seated in red booths. Warm morning light. No customers behind counter.
